scripts.rust:build-asm: rimraf ./rust/pkg && ./scripts/wasm-build.sh browser && npm run asm:build && npm run js:flowgen
scripts.rust:build-asm:gc: rimraf ./rust/pkg && ./scripts/wasm-build.sh browser --gc && npm run asm:build && npm run js:flowgen
scripts.js:prepack: npm run rust:test && rimraf ./publish && cp -r ./rust/pkg ./publish && cp README.md publish/ && cp LICENSE publish/
scripts.js:pack-nodejs:no-gc: npm run rust:build-nodejs && npm run js:prepack && node ./scripts/package-helper -nodejs && cd publish && npm pack
scripts.js:pack-browser:no-gc: npm run rust:build-browser && npm run js:prepack && node ./scripts/package-helper -browser && cd publish && npm pack
scripts.js:pack-asm:no-gc: npm run rust:build-asm && npm run js:prepack && node ./scripts/package-helper -asmjs && cd publish && npm pack
scripts.js:pack-nodejs:gc: npm run rust:build-nodejs:gc && npm run js:prepack && node ./scripts/package-helper -nodejs -gc && cd publish && npm pack
scripts.js:pack-browser:gc: npm run rust:build-browser:gc && npm run js:prepack && node ./scripts/package-helper -browser -gc && cd publish && npm pack
scripts.js:pack-asm:gc: npm run rust:build-asm:gc && npm run js:prepack && node ./scripts/package-helper -asmjs -gc && cd publish && npm pack
scripts.test:packages: npm run test:package-nodejs && npm run test:package-browser && npm run test:package-asm && npm run test:package-asm-fixture
scripts.verify: npm run test:package-helper && npm run test:package-asm-fixture && npm run rust:test

hooks.pre-push: npm run rust:test && npm run rust:build-nodejs
